hook.summary: Mr. Monopoly and Hello Kitty dance together to introduce a brand collaboration.
hook.visual_action: Mr. Monopoly and Hello Kitty perform a synchronized dance against a pink background with floating circles.
hook.text_overlay: MONOPOLY GO! HELLO KITTY AND FRIENDS

scene_flow: Mr. Monopoly and Hello Kitty dance together against a vibrant pink backdrop.
Quick cuts introduce Sanrio characters like Cinnamoroll, Pochacco, Pompompurin, and Kuromi with festive star effects.
The characters transition to a 3D Monopoly board set in a colorful London-inspired city under a rainbow.
The full cast dances together on the board as event stickers and confetti fall.
Final end card displays the event dates and a 'Play Now' call to action.
audience_proxy: Fans of Sanrio characters and casual mobile gamers who enjoy social, high-energy board games.
